TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: KA ni-k'mato-hynna, rou ni-mattæ'i-kaha mattæ'i-limou-limou ki sou k'atta ta ti Jesus, ka ni-d'marang thaboul tou Galilæä, ka ni-iroua mou-arogh ki Jordaan tou pææpt-ten ki Judæa.
KA ni-k'mato-hynna, rou ni-mattæ'i-kaha mattæ'i-limou-limou ki sou k'atta ta ti Jesus, ka ni-d'marang thaboul tou Galilæä, ka ni-iroua mou-arogh ki Jordaan tou pææpt-ten ki Judæa.
S.TRANSL: Ndehet geschiedde doe Jesus dese woorden ghe-eyndight hadde dat hy bertrock ban Gililea ende quam obe den Jordaen in de landtpalen ban Judea.
And it came to pass, that when Jesus had finished these sayings, he departed from Galilee, and came into the coasts of Judaea beyond Jordan;
耶穌說完了這些話，就離開加利利，來到猶太的境界約旦河外。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mææuugh tyni-æn ta mabatoung ki makoi-lalaulau, ka ni-pædærikæh tyn neini-æn to hynna.
Ka ni-mææuugh tyni-æn ta mabatoung ki makoi-lalaulau, ka ni-pædærikæh tyn neini-æn to hynna.
S.TRANSL: Ende bele charen bolgden hem ende hy genas se aldaer.
And great multitudes followed him; and he healed them there.
有許多人跟着他，他就在那裏把他們的病人治好了。

S.FORM: Ka ni-iroua tyni-æn ta Fa-riséen ki rih-pung-ah tyni-en, k'ma, Hahei-en kaua ta taou pæ-darang ki kæi-æn tyn alei ki ma mang
Ka ni-iroua tyni-æn ta Fa-riséen ki rih-pung-ah tyni-en, k'ma, Hahei-en kaua ta taou pæ-darang ki kæi-æn tyn alei ki ma mang
S.TRANSL: Ende de Pharilten quamen tot hem bersoeckende hem ende seggende tot hem Js het cen mensche geoorloft fijn wyf te berlaten om allerley oorsake +
The Pharisees also came unto him, tempting him, and saying unto him, Is it lawful for a man to put away his wife for every cause?
有法利賽人來試探耶穌，說：「人無論甚麼緣故都可以休妻嗎？」

S.FORM: Nda ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta teni k'ma neini-æn, Assi-moumi lava ni-ktung, ka teni ka ni-men-ryngei [ki kaæuloung] tou naunamon, ka ni-pei-ryngei tyn neini-æn ta pæ-rah ta jna?
Nda ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta teni k'ma neini-æn, Assi-moumi lava ni-ktung, ka teni ka ni-men-ryngei [ki kaæuloung] tou naunamon, ka ni-pei-ryngei tyn neini-æn ta pæ-rah ta jna?
S.TRANSL: Dochhy antwoordende seyde tot haer En hebt ghy niet gelesen die ban den beginne [ den mensche] gemaeckt heeft dat hy'se gemaeckt heeft man ende wyfs
And he answered and said unto them, Have ye not read, that he which made them at the beginning made them male and female,
耶穌回答說：「那起初造人的，是造男造女，

S.FORM: Ka ni-komm'appa, Alei ki anna d'marang-ah ta taqu ki Rama ki Reina, ka saul-lam-ah ki ki-en tyn, ka rarouha ka-anna saäsat-ah ki vaat.
Ka ni-komm'appa, Alei ki anna d'marang-ah ta taqu ki Rama ki Reina, ka saul-lam-ah ki ki-en tyn, ka rarouha ka-anna saäsat-ah ki vaat.
S.TRANSL: Eit geseght heeft Daerom sal een mensche bady efi moede? berlaten eti sal shnen wijbe aenhangen efi die twee lullen tot een bleetch zijn.
And said, For this cause shall a man leave father and mother, and shall cleave to his wife: and they twain shall be one flesh?
並且說：『因此，人要離開父母，與妻子連合，二人成為一體。』這經你們沒有念過嗎？

S.FORM: K'ma-hynna ka assi rarouha ta neni, nda dyk saäsat ki vaät. Anna ka ni-papæ-sal ki Alid assi papahpiah-auh ki kaæuloung.
K'ma-hynna ka assi rarouha ta neni, nda dyk saäsat ki vaät. Anna ka ni-papæ-sal ki Alid assi papahpiah-auh ki kaæuloung.
S.TRANSL: Alsoo dat p niet meer twee en zijn mae? ef bleesch. Het gene dan Godt te samen oheborgt heeft en schepdede menschemer,
Wherefore they are no more twain, but one flesh. What therefore God hath joined together, let not man put asunder.
既然如此，夫妻不再是兩個人，乃是一體的了。所以，上帝配合的，人不可分開。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma [ta neni] tyni-æn, Kaoumang ka ni-pakou-sou-en ti Moses ka p'ha-en-eih ta soulat ki pad-ad-arad-arang, ka pad-arang-auh ta teini [ka kæi-en ki pæræh?]
Ni-k'ma [ta neni] tyni-æn, Kaoumang ka ni-pakou-sou-en ti Moses ka p'ha-en-eih ta soulat ki pad-ad-arad-arang, ka pad-arang-auh ta teini [ka kæi-en ki pæræh?]
S.TRANSL: Sy leyden tot hem Waerom heeft dan Moles geboden eenen schepdt-brief te geben ende hae: te berlaten
They say unto him, Why did Moses then command to give a writing of divorcement, and to put her away?
法利賽人說：「這樣，摩西為甚麼吩咐給妻子休書，就可以休她呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma [ta teni] neini-æn, Ni-hahei-en-kamou ti Moses alei ki 'thagh-oumi ki tintin ka pad-a-rang-ah-kamou ki kæi-'en-noumi: Rå assi ni-k'ma-hynna tou nauna-mou.
Ni-k'ma [ta teni] neini-æn, Ni-hahei-en-kamou ti Moses alei ki 'thagh-oumi ki tintin ka pad-a-rang-ah-kamou ki kæi-'en-noumi: Rå assi ni-k'ma-hynna tou naunamou.
S.TRANSL: hy leyde tot haer Moses heeft ban wegen de hardigheyt uwer hertenu toegelaten uwe wijben te berlaten: Mae ban den beginne en is het alsoo niet geweelt.
He saith unto them, Moses because of the hardness of your hearts suffered you to put away your wives: but from the beginning it was not so.
耶穌說：「摩西因為你們的心硬，所以許你們休妻，但起初並不是這樣。

S.FORM: Râ koun-næu-kamou, Ti-mamang ta padarang ki ki-æn tyn, dou assi alei ki kavei-joung-an, ka maja ki pani, 'rbourbo atou-râ, ka timamang ta mæ'iä ki ni-pæd'arang, 'rbourbo-[appa-râ.]
Râ koun-næu-kamou, Ti-mamang ta padarang ki ki-æn tyn, dou assi alei ki kavei-joung-an, ka maja ki pani, 'rbourbo atou-râ, ka timamang ta mæ'iä ki ni-pæd'arang, 'rbourbo-[appa-râ.]
S.TRANSL: MWaerickseggeu Dat foo wieshn wijf berlaet anders dan om hoererye ende een ander trouwt [die] doet obexspel eii die de berlatene trouwt doet [oock] obexspel,
And I say unto you, Whosoever shall put away his wife, except it be for fornication, and shall marry another, committeth adultery: and whoso marrieth her which is put away doth commit adultery.
我告訴你們，凡休妻另娶的，若不是為淫亂的緣故，就是犯姦淫了；有人娶那被休的婦人，也是犯姦淫了。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta Pahta-tæutæu-han tyn, Heirou komma-hynna ta kidi ki ka'æuloung ki kæ iän tyn, assi mariang ka mæ'iä-ah,
Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta Pahtatæutæu-han tyn, Heirou komma-hynna ta kidi ki ka'æuloung ki kæ iän tyn, assi mariang ka mæ'iä-ah,
S.TRANSL: Hijne Ditcipelen eyden tot hem Indien de sake des menschen met den wijbe alsoo staet soo en is het niet orbarr te trouwen,
His disciples say unto him, If the case of the man be so with his wife, it is not good to marry.
門徒對耶穌說：「人和妻子既是這樣，倒不如不娶。」

S.FORM: Teni-râ ni-kma neini-æn, Assi pæh-ymmid pah-balei ki sou k'atta, dyk neinien ka ni-p'ha-æn-ato.
Teni-râ ni-kma neini-æn, Assi pæh-ymmid pah-balei ki sou k'atta, dyk neinien ka ni-p'ha-æn-ato.
S.TRANSL: Boch hy fepde tot haer Alle en batten dit woort | ret | mae? dien het gegeben s.
But he said unto them, All men cannot receive this saying, save they to whom it is given.
耶穌說：「這話不是人都能領受的，惟獨賜給誰，誰才能領受。

S.FORM: Ka akoume-'ato ki ni-hæp, ka ni-pei-alak-kin komma-hynna ki vouil ki rena [nein]: ka akou-meä ki ni-ähæp ka ni-ähæp ki kaæuloung: ka akoume-'appa ki ni-ähæp ka ni-mæhæp neini-æn tei-mado alei ki Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum. Tima-mang ta pah-lpough pah-balei [ki atta] pæh-balei-auto.

Ka akoume-'ato ki ni-hæp, ka ni-pei-alak-kin komma-hynna ki vouil ki rena [nein]: ka akou-meä ki ni-ähæp ka ni-ähæp ki kaæuloung: ka akoume-'appa ki ni-ähæp ka ni-mæhæp neini-æn tei-mado alei ki Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum. Tima-mang ta pah-lpough pah-balei [ki atta] pæh-balei-auto.
S.TRANSL: Want daer zijn gesnedene die uyt moeders lijbe alsoo geboren zijn: ende dae zijn gesnedene die ban de mentchen gesneden zijn: ende daer 3yn gesnedene die haer felben gesneden hebben om Het Koninckryck der Hemeten. Die [dit] batten kan batte [het.]

For there are some eunuchs, which were so born from their mother's womb: and there are some eunuchs, which were made eunuchs of men: and there be eunuchs, which have made themselves eunuchs for the kingdom of heaven's sake. He that is able to receive it, let him receive it.
因為有生來是閹人，也有被人閹的，並有為天國的緣故自閹的。這話誰能領受就可以領受。」 （可10‧13－16；路18‧15－17）

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna ni-âd' pa ou-koua tyni-æn ta rarauwei ka atta-halap-eih tyn ta rima neini-æn, tou pako-Alilid-den: nda ni-patymhga'n ta neini ki Pahtatæu-tæu-hæn.
Tou kidi k'anna ni-âd' pa ou-koua tyni-æn ta rarauwei ka atta-halap-eih tyn ta rima neini-æn, tou pako-Alilid-den: nda ni-patymhga'n ta neini ki Pahtatæu-tæu-hæn.
S.TRANSL: Boe | wicrden kinderkens tot hem gebracht op pers de handen haer sonde eggen ende bidden: ende De oem ie beft} aften deetbe
Then were there brought unto him little children, that he should put his hands on them, and pray: and the disciples rebuked them.
那時，有人帶着小孩子來見耶穌，要耶穌給他們按手禱告，門徒就責備那些人。

S.FORM: Râ ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus, ou-roung-an-ei ta rarauwei, ynna ma-vagh neini-æn pa-ou-koua jau-an: alei ka â neini ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Râ ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus, ou-roung-an-ei ta rarauwei, ynna ma-vagh neini-æn pa-ou-koua jau-an: alei ka â neini ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Maer Jesus sepde Laec af ban de kinderkens ende en berhinde:t hae: niet tot my te komen : want der
But Jesus said, Suffer little children, and forbid them not, to come unto me: for of such is the kingdom of heaven.
耶穌說：「讓小孩子到我這裏來，不要禁止他們；因為在天國的，正是這樣的人。」

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-atta-halap-en tyn ta rima neini-æn, ni-thaboul ta teni d'marang hynna.
Irou ka ni-atta-halap-en tyn ta rima neini-æn, ni-thaboul ta teni d'marang hynna.
S.TRANSL: Ende als. hw hae: de handen opgheleght hadde berttock hy ban daer.
And he laid his hands on them, and departed thence.
耶穌給他們按手，就離開那地方去了。 （可10‧17－31；路18‧18－30）

S.FORM: Ka kyttei, ka saät [ki vouel] ta ni-mou-koua ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tama-mahtautuuh ka mariang, pam't-au-mau ta riang ki mang, tou akoumea-ei-mau ki kauæg-han ka myh-kakoua myd-darynnough?
Ka kyttei, ka saät [ki vouel] ta ni-mou-koua ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tama-mahtautuuh ka mariang, pam't-au-mau ta riang ki mang, tou akoumea-ei-mau ki kauæg-han ka myh-kakoua myd-darynnough?
S.TRANSL: Ende fiet Datr quam ten tot Hem ende [eyde tor hem | Goede meester wat fal tck goedts doen op dat ick het eeuwige leben hebbe r $
And, behold, one came and said unto him, Good Master, what good thing shall I do, that I may have eternal life?
有一個人來見耶穌，說：「夫子，我該做甚麼善事才能得永生？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta teni tyni-æn, Ka mang ta pa-nænang-en-hou jau-an ka mariang? Aousi ta tima-mang ka mariang, dyk sâsat ki Alid. Heirou mamoei kow mou-rbo tou kæuæg-han, nda ah-koua-au ta na sou ki ni-pakou-sou-en [tou Tatoulko.]

Ni-k'ma ta teni tyni-æn, Ka mang ta pa-nænang-en-hou jau-an ka mariang? Aousi ta tima-mang ka mariang, dyk sâsat ki Alid. Heirou mamoei kow mou-rbo tou kæuæg-han, nda ah-koua-au ta na sou ki ni-pakou-sou-en [tou Tatoulko.]
S.TRANSL: Ende hy sepde cot hem Wat noemt gy mp goedt + Niemandt en is goet Dan een [namelick] Godt, Doch wilt gp in het leben ingaen onderhout de gebo-
And he said unto him, Why callest thou me good? there is none good but one, that is, God: but if thou wilt enter into life, keep the commandments.
耶穌對他說：「你為甚麼以善事問我呢？只有一位是善的。你若要進入永生，就當遵守誡命。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta teni tyni-æn, Sou ka mang? Nda ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus [Atta:] Assi kow louhpough-ah: Assi kow mou-zouzoung-ah ni-makakyttil Assi kow haou-zoung-ah: Assi kow hmæ'il-ah si haharang.
Ni-k'ma ta teni tyni-æn, Sou ka mang? Nda ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus [Atta:] Assi kow louhpough-ah: Assi kow mou-zouzoung-ah ni-makakyttil Assi kow haou-zoung-ah: Assi kow hmæ'il-ah si haharang.
S.TRANSL: dat onmogelick maer by Godt zijn alle dingen mogelick.
He saith unto him, Which? Jesus said, Thou shalt do no murder, Thou shalt not commit adultery, Thou shalt not steal, Thou shalt not bear false witness,
他說：「甚麼誡命？」耶穌說：「就是不可殺人；不可姦淫；不可偷盜；不可作假見證；

S.FORM: Milligh-a-kow ti Am-au-hou-en ti In-au-hou-en: ka, Ma-væ'æng-o-ah kow ki ta'u ka rarou-ma mama mamado ymhou-an
Milligh-a-kow ti Am-au-hou-en ti In-au-hou-en: ka, Ma-væ'æng-o-ah kow ki ta'u ka rarou-ma mama mamado ymhou-an
S.TRANSL: Gert uwen bader ende moeder:ende Ghp fult uwen Naesten lief Hebben als u . felben.
Honour thy father and thy mother: and, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.
當孝敬父母；又當愛人如己。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta kæuh-paparah, Ymd-dennæu milligh ta mamang katta ki na kararauwei-au: Ka mang ta äou-si-appa jæu-an?
Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta kæuh-paparah, Ymd-dennæu milligh ta mamang katta ki na kararauwei-au: Ka mang ta äou-si-appa jæu-an?
S.TRANSL: De Jonghelingh leyde tot hem Alle dese dingen hebbe ick onderhouden ban mijne jonckhept af; Wat gebreeckt my noch >
The young man saith unto him, All these things have I kept from my youth up: what lack I yet?
那少年人說：「這一切我都遵守了，還缺少甚麼呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni æn, Irou mamoei kow mænænæh mataraæuh, oukouâ, pa-zadum-m'a ki mamang oho, ka p'hæ-eito ki malimouk, ka akou-me'æh kow ki vangei tou tounnoun ki vullum: ka mou-kouâ hia, mæuuugh jau an-da.

Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni æn, Irou mamoei kow mænænæh mataraæuh, oukouâ, pa-zadum-m'a ki mamang oho, ka p'hæ-eito ki malimouk, ka akou-me'æh kow ki vangei tou tounnoun ki vullum: ka mou-kouâ hia, mæuuugh jau an-da.
S.TRANSL: Jesus seyde tot hem Soo ghp wilt bolmaeckt 3yn gaet henen berkoopt wat ghy hebt ende geefthet den Armen ende ghy sult eenen schat hebben in den Hemel : ende komt herwaerts bolght mp.
Jesus said unto him, If thou wilt be perfect, go and sell that thou hast, and give to the poor, and thou shalt have treasure in heaven: and come and follow me.
耶穌說：「你若願意作完全人，可去變賣你所有的，分給窮人，就必有財寶在天上；你還要來跟從我。」

S.FORM: Irou ka millingigh ki sou katta ta Kauh-pæparah, ni-d'ma-rang ta teni mavoulas,alei ka akou-mea tyni-æn ki madagh ki hourup.
Irou ka millingigh ki sou katta ta Kauh-pæparah, ni-d'ma-rang ta teni mavoulas,alei ka akou-mea tyni-æn ki madagh ki hourup.
S.TRANSL: Alsnu de Jongeling dit woordt hoorde gingh Hp bedroeft wech : wane hy hadde bele goederen.
But when the young man heard that saying, he went away sorrowful: for he had great possessions.
那少年人聽見這話，就憂憂愁愁地走了，因為他的產業很多。

S.FORM: Nda ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn, Missing koun-næu-kamou-ra, ka mag-ho-gpyt ta mavangei mou-rbo tou pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vul. lum.
Nda ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn, Missing koun-næu-kamou-ra, ka mag-ho-gpyt ta mavangei mou-rbo tou pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vul. lum.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus leyde tot lijne Dilcipelen Doorwaer ick segghe u dat een rijcke swaerlick in het honinckryck der Hemelen sal ingaen.
Then said Jesus unto his disciples, Verily I say unto you, That a rich man shall hardly enter into the kingdom of heaven.
耶穌對門徒說：「我實在告訴你們，財主進天國是難的。

S.FORM: Ka he-la-en-au-kamou ma-sousou, Ka si-ourou-hmæh-ei ta louang ka makhgoun ki rikour tau-koua tou lbas ki simsin, ka: mou-rbo-ah ta mavangei tou pei-sasou-an ki Alid.
Ka he-la-en-au-kamou ma-sousou, Ka si-ourou-hmæh-ei ta louang ka makhgoun ki rikour tau-koua tou lbas ki simsin, ka: mou-rbo-ah ta mavangei tou pei-sasou-an ki Alid.
S.TRANSL: Ende wederom segge ick u Het is lichter dat een kemel gae door de ooge ban een naelde dan dat een rijcke ingae in het Koninckrijcke Godts. =
And again I say unto you, It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle, than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of God.
我又告訴你們，駱駝穿過針的眼，比財主進上帝的國還容易呢！」

S.FORM: Tou illing-hen [ki atta] ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn, ouhang ni-mouhkiap ta neni, ka ni-k'ma, Timang ta paka-lpoug-eih rou an-na paka-riang?
Tou illing-hen [ki atta] ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn, ouhang ni-mouhkiap ta neni, ka ni-k'ma, Timang ta paka-lpoug-eih rou an-na paka-riang?
S.TRANSL: Sijne Discipelen nu {dir ] hoorende wierden seer berflaghen seggende Wie kan dan saligh wordens
When his disciples heard it, they were exceedingly amazed, saying, Who then can be saved?
門徒聽見這話，就希奇得很，說：「這樣誰能得救呢？」

S.FORM: Ka dou 'ararau ti Jesus ni-k'ma neini-æn, Assi pæi-lpoug-hen ta atta tou ka'æuloung-an, rå pæi Ipoug-hen ymmid ki mamang ki Alid.
Ka dou 'ararau ti Jesus ni-k'ma neini-æn, Assi pæi-lpoug-hen ta atta tou ka'æuloung-an, rå pæi Ipoug-hen ymmid ki mamang ki Alid.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus [haes] aensiende sepde tot haer By
But Jesus beheld them, and said unto them, With men this is impossible; but with God all things are possible.
耶穌看着他們，說：「在人這是不能的，在上帝凡事都能。」

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna doumat tæ'i-v'lli ta ti Petrus ni-k'ma tyni-æn, K'ytt'ei, ni-saou-ymd-änian sau-tæuagh ki mamang, ka ni mæuuuuh-kame ymhou-an: ma-mang-al-ato ymian-æn?
Tou kidi k'anna doumat tæ'i-v'lli ta ti Petrus ni-k'ma tyni-æn, K'ytt'ei, ni-saou-ymd-änian sau-tæuagh ki mamang, ka ni mæuuuuh-kame ymhou-an: ma-mang-al-ato ymian-æn?
S.TRANSL: Boe antwoordde Petrus ende sepde tot hem Siet wp hebben alles berlaten ende zijn u gebolght : wat sal ons dan gewerden :
Then answered Peter and said unto him, Behold, we have forsaken all, and followed thee; what shall we have therefore?
彼得就對他說：「看哪，我們已經撇下所有的跟從你，將來我們要得甚麼呢？」

S.FORM: Nda ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Missing koun-nau-ka-mou-râ, ka ymoumi ka ni-mæu-auug jau-an tou pei-likoug-hen mei-alak, rou mier-roung-al-ato ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou iraroung-an ki tounnoun ki karæræmæg-hen ki kidi tyn, ka mieroung-al-appa-kamou tou såt kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha ki ierraroung-an ka toun-noun pæmæmæh ki sât kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha ki kavouy-vouyl-an ti Isræ'l.

Nda ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Missing koun-nau-ka-mou-râ, ka ymoumi ka ni-mæu-auug jau-an tou pei-likoug-hen mei-alak, rou mier-roung-al-ato ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou iraroung-an ki tounnoun ki karæræmæg-hen ki kidi tyn, ka mieroung-al-appa-kamou tou såt kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha ki ierraroung-an ka toun-noun pæmæmæh ki sât kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha ki kavouy-vouyl-an ti Isræ'l.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus lepde tot haer Doorwaer ick legge u dat ghy die my ghebolght rht in de weder geboorte wanneer de Sone des menschen sal geseten rijii op den Throon oon [lijner Heerlickhept [dat] ghy oock sult sitten op twaelf Throonen oordeelende de twaelf gheslachten Ifratls.

And Jesus said unto them, Verily I say unto you, That ye which have followed me, in the regeneration when the Son of man shall sit in the throne of his glory, ye also shall sit upon twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.
耶穌說：「我實在告訴你們，你們這跟從我的人，到復興的時候，人子坐在他榮耀的寶座上，你們也要坐在十二個寶座上，審判以色列十二個支派。

S.FORM: Ka timamang ta sau-tauagh-al-ato ki tallagh, ki tæia-papara, ki niäha, ki rama, ki rena, ki kæi-æn, ki alalak, ki ouma-ouma lava alei ki Nanang-au, tenita A-bli-ah mara ki sât kæ ætong-han, ka ta-bli-al-appa ki kæuæg-han ka myhkakoua myddarynnough.

Ka timamang ta sau-tauagh-al-ato ki tallagh, ki tæia-papara, ki niäha, ki rama, ki rena, ki kæi-æn, ki alalak, ki ouma-ouma lava alei ki Nanang-au, tenita A-bli-ah mara ki sât kæ ætong-han, ka ta-bli-al-appa ki kæuæg-han ka myhkakoua myddarynnough.
S.TRANSL: Ende so wie [al berlaten hebben huysen of broeders of fulters of bade; of moeder of wyf of kinderen of ackers om mijns Naems wille die] sal hondert-bout ontfangen ende het eeuwige leben be-erben.

And every one that hath forsaken houses, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands, for my name's sake, shall receive an hundredfold, and shall inherit everlasting life.
凡為我的名撇下房屋，或是弟兄、姊妹、父親、母親、兒女、田地的，必要得着百倍，並且承受永生。

S.FORM: Râ mabatoung ki si-ouro. ouro ta si-augh-al-ato, ka maba. toung ki si-äæugh ta si-ouro-ou-ro-al-ato. Ka rarouha kytti-an kilbæh ki soulat.
Râ mabatoung ki si-ouro. ouro ta si-augh-al-ato, ka maba. toung ki si-äæugh ta si-ouro-ou-ro-al-ato. Ka rarouha kytti-an kilbæh ki soulat.
S.TRANSL: Watet bele cesfte fullen de laetite zijn ende[ ele]laetste de ecrlte,
But many that are first shall be last; and the last shall be first.
然而，有許多在前的，將要在後；在後的，將要在前。」
